Class Tube

java.lang.Object
geometries.api.Geometry
geometries.impl.Tube
Direct Known Subclasses:
Cylinder
public class Tube extends Geometry
Class Tube represents an infinite cylindrical tube in 3D space.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Tube(double radius, Ray axis)
    Constructs a tube with a given radius and axis ray.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Vector
    getNormal(Point point)
    Returns the normal vector to the geometry at the given point.

    • Tube

      public Tube(double radius, Ray axis)
      Constructs a tube with a given radius and axis ray.
      Parameters:
      radius - the radius of the tube
      axis - the axis ray of the tube

  • Method Details

    • getNormal

      public Vector getNormal(Point point)
      Description copied from class: Geometry
      Returns the normal vector to the geometry at the given point.
      Specified by:
      getNormal in class Geometry
      Parameters:
      point - a point on the surface of the geometry
      Returns:
      the normal vector at that point
